title: Final Polish — Language and Accessibility
description: Add the finishing touches to your portfolio for accessibility and best practices. Set the lang attribute on the html tag, add a meta viewport tag for responsive design, and add a meta description. Verify all images have alt text and all form inputs have labels.
starter_code:
# Portfolio Website — Step 10: Language and Accessibility # Add lang attribute, meta viewport, meta description. # Ensure all images have alt and all inputs have labels. html = """ My Portfolio

Your Name

About Me | Projects | Contact

About Me

I am a developer who is passionate about building things. I am constantly learning and love problem-solving.

SkillLevelYears
HTMLBeginner1
CSSBeginner1
PythonIntermediate2

My Projects

Contact

© 2026 Your Name

""" print(html)
test_code:
assert 'lang="en"' in html.lower() or "lang='en'" in html.lower(), 'Must add lang="en" attribute to the <html> tag'
assert 'viewport' in html.lower(), 'Must include a meta viewport tag for responsive design'
assert 'name="viewport"' in html.lower() or "name='viewport'" in html.lower(), 'Meta viewport must have name="viewport"'
assert 'name="description"' in html.lower() or "name='description'" in html.lower(), 'Must include a meta tag with name="description"'
assert 'content=' in html.lower(), 'Meta tags must have a content attribute'
assert '<header>' in html.lower(), 'Must still include semantic header element'
assert '<main>' in html.lower(), 'Must still include semantic main element'
assert '<footer>' in html.lower(), 'Must still include semantic footer element'
acceptance_criteria: The html tag has lang="en" attribute
A meta viewport tag is in the head
A meta description tag is in the head
All form inputs have corresponding labels
hints: Description: <meta name="description" content="Personal portfolio of Your Name">
Check that every has an alt attribute and every has a
